import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; const TeacherDashboard = () => { const [darkMode] = useState(false); const [subjects, setSubjects] = useState([]); const [error, setError] = useState(''); const username = localStorage.getItem('username'); const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken'); useEffect(() => { fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/teacher-subjects/', { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` }, }) .then(res => res.json()) .then(data => { if (Array.isArray(data)) setSubjects(data); else setError('Invalid subject data.'); }) .catch(() => setError('Failed to fetch teacher subjects.')); }, []); return (

📊 School Management Dashboard

Hi, {username} 👋

Welcome, {username}

{error &&

{error}

}
📚 Students

Manage all registered students.

👨‍🏫 Teachers

View and update teacher records.

📘 My Subjects
{subjects.length === 0 ? (

No subjects assigned.

) : (
    {subjects.map((subj, i) => (
  • {subj.name} ({subj.classroom})
    • ))}
)}
🏫 Classrooms

Assign students and teachers to classes.

📅 Timetable

Manage class schedules and time slots.

✅ Attendance

Track daily attendance records.

🏅 Grades

Enter and view student grades.

); }; export default TeacherDashboard;
